info.name: Post Articles API - Sharing Vision 2023
info.description:
Postman collection for the Test Backend - Sharing Vision 2023 article microservice.

Set the `base_url` collection variable (default http://localhost:8080) before running.

request.description: Creates a new article. Validation: title >= 20 chars, content >= 200 chars, category >= 3 chars, status one of publish | draft | thrash.
Lists articles with paging. Path is /article/<limit>/<offset>. Optional query ?status=publish|draft|thrash filters by status.
Returns a single article by id. Responds 404 when the id does not exist.
Updates the article with the requested id. POST and PATCH to the same URL are also accepted. Same validation rules as create.
Deletes the article with the requested id. Responds 404 when the id does not exist.
